title: Vengeance
tmdbOverview: The brutal murder of the wife of “Toro,” a military hero in the special forces, turns him into a man with a single purpose: revenge. After a stroke of fate makes him a millionaire, Carlos transforms his fortune into an arsenal and, together with his closest soldiers, sets out to hunt down those responsible.
synopsis: Released in 2026, Vengeance is a action and thriller film from Spain and United States. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on TMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
